ns0:entry.ns0:title: DependencyTrack/dependency-track
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DependencyTrack/dependency-track
Language: java
Dependency-Track is an intelligent Component Analysis platform that allows organizations to identify and reduce risk in the software supply chain.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

Language: java
World's most powerful open data catalog for building a high-performance, geo-distributed and federated metadata lake.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/paimon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/paimon
Language: java
Apache Paimon is a lake format that enables building a Realtime Lakehouse Architecture with Flink and Spark for both streaming and batch operations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/tika
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/tika
Language: java
The Apache Tika toolkit detects and extracts metadata and text from over a thousand different file types (such as PPT, XLS, and PDF).

An open-source, code-first Java toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.
